hero.headline: Beware of scams!
hero.headline_highlight: Find out if your partner is a fraud
hero.subtitle: Scammers use dating apps to run romance scams and sell intimate videos. We track over 396 million profiles hosted across the globe. Learn how to protect yourself from criminals.
hero.subtitle2: Results in seconds. Works in any country.

awareness.text: In the US alone, <gold>+$1.3 billion</gold> stolen from romance scam victims. Criminals use dating apps for blackmail and exposure. You could be their next target.

personas.title: Who needs [18+]Check
personas.partners_desc: Find out if your partner is real or selling intimate content without consent.
personas.dating_desc: Avoid fake lovers on dating platforms. +396 million profiles tracked worldwide.
personas.business_desc: Prevent your image from being used for blackmail, fraud and exposure to family.

pricing.title: Professional investigation made accessible
pricing.subtitle: A fraction of the cost of a private investigator

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. [18+]Check only searches information voluntarily published on public platforms. No law is violated by searching data that the person themselves made public.
faq.q2: Will the person know they were searched?
faq.a2: No. The search is 100% discreet. No notification is sent, no profile is directly accessed. Your privacy and theirs are respected.
faq.a3: Our AI cross-references multiple data sources and assigns a risk score based on evidence found. HIGH score results include direct verification links.
faq.a4: Your searches are in your private history, accessible only by you. You can delete your history at any time. We never share data with third parties.
faq.a5: You upload a photo and our AI compares it with images found on adult platforms. The photo is never stored after processing.
faq.a6: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard at any time, no penalties, no hassle.

cta.headline: Your dignity is priceless.
cta.subtext: Our mission is to prevent your image and reputation from being used for blackmail and illicit enrichment.
cta.scams: In partnership with global official agencies, we identify criminals and restore your <gold>dignity</gold>.
cta.deserve: Protect yourself. Protect those you love.
cta.global_note: Available globally — works in any country.
